creator: sean_bruno@yahoo.com
text:
Actually, this one is slightly more complex and I got trigger happy with
the pr submission.

This one needs a post-patch with some more bits:

post-patch:
    @${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's/UTF-8\\n/UTF-8/gI' ${WRKSRC}/iso_15924/*.po
    @${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's/UTF-8\\n/UTF-8/gI' ${WRKSRC}/iso_3166/*.po
    @${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's/UTF-8\\n/UTF-8/gI' ${WRKSRC}/iso_3166_2/*.po
    @${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's/UTF-8\\n/UTF-8/gI' ${WRKSRC}/iso_4217/*.po
    @${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's/UTF-8\\n/UTF-8/gI' ${WRKSRC}/iso_639/*.po
    @${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's/UTF-8\\n/UTF-8/gI' ${WRKSRC}/iso_629_3/*.po
